name: Agent Vault
description: Open-source credential proxy for AI agents by Infisical. Agents call APIs without ever seeing secrets — credentials injected at the network layer via HTTPS_PROXY.

skills.name: Credential Injection
skills.description: Inject API keys and secrets at the network layer so agents never handle credentials directly

skills.name: Proxy Setup
skills.description: Configure as HTTPS_PROXY in minutes with a single Go binary — zero code changes to agents required

skills.name: Secret Rotation
skills.description: Rotate credentials centrally without updating or redeploying any agent or application config

skills.name: Audit Trail
skills.description: Log every credential access with agent identity and timestamp for compliance and debugging
